marketplace.name: wsl-skills
marketplace.description: Claude Code skills for the Kuetix Workflow Specific Language

skills.name: Write WSL
skills.description: Write workflows in WSL (verbose state machine syntax)

skills.name: Write SWSL
skills.description: Write workflows in SWSL (simplified chaining syntax)

skills.name: Write Module Transition
skills.description: Create module transitions for complex workflow orchestration

skills.name: Explain WSL
skills.description: Analyze and explain what a workflow does

skills.name: Debug WSL
skills.description: Debug parsing errors and runtime issues in WSL workflows

skills.name: Write Parser Test
skills.description: Write tests for the WSL parser

skills.name: Convert WSL/SWSL
skills.description: Convert between WSL and SWSL syntax
